kbd.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
pairing.notConnectedYet: Not connected yet — try again in a moment.
voice.micRequired: Microphone is required to start a call.
file.recipientOffline: Recipient is offline — large files need both people online
address.noInviteLink: No invite link available yet — wait for connection.
dm.historyCleared: DM history cleared on this device
room.youAreOwner: You are now the owner of this room.
pod.unreachable: Pod unreachable — messages may be delayed
pod.urlMustHttps: Pod server URL must start with https://
contact.requestAccepted: Friend request accepted — waiting for certificate…
contact.expiresInDays.one: Your connection with {peer} expires in {count} day.
contact.expiresInDays.other: Your connection with {peer} expires in {count} days.
session.revoked: This session was revoked from another device.
webhook.createdCopySecret: Outgoing webhook created. Copy the secret now — it won't be shown again.
file.largeDmOnly: Large files can only be sent in direct messages
app.gatewayCrashed: Gateway crashed - please restart the app
feed.beFirst: Be the first to say hello.
confirm.clearDmHistory: Clear all locally-saved DM history on this device? Encrypted DMs will no longer reload after this.
confirm.deleteIdentity: This will permanently delete your local identity key, all rooms, messages, and pod credentials. You cannot undo this. Continue?
confirm.banMember: Ban this member? They'll be removed and can't rejoin.
confirm.deleteRoom: Delete this room permanently? All messages and history will be lost for all members.
prompt.choosePassphrase: Choose a passphrase to protect your backup:
prompt.enterPassphrase: Enter the passphrase for this backup:
error.chunk_too_large: File chunk too large — try a smaller file.
error.not_a_room_member: You're not a member of this room.
error.banned_from_room: You've been banned from this room.
error.room_not_found: Room not found — it may have been deleted.
error.call_too_frequent: Please wait a moment before calling again.
error.voice_invite_not_allowed: You can only call people in your contacts or rooms.
error.voice_sessions_full: The gateway can't take more calls right now.
error.voice_note_remote_unsupported: Voice notes can't be sent to contacts on other gateways yet.
error.reaction_limit_reached: Reaction limit reached for this message.
error.not_registered: Not connected yet — give it a second and retry.
error.send_at_future: Pick a time in the future.
error.cannot_delete_others: You can only delete your own messages.
error.cannot_edit_others: You can only edit your own messages.
error.fr.invalid_address: Invalid address — use the format did:key:…@wss://gateway.
error.fr.delivery_failed: Could not reach that gateway — check the address and try again.
error.fr.invalid_signature: That invite has expired or is invalid.
error.fr.invite_not_found: Invite not found — it may have already been used.
error.fr.contact_revoked: This contact has been revoked. You can no longer send messages.
